# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

Prevent XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.
# Category: xxe

<?php
function parseUserConfig($xmlString) {
    // Disable libxml features to prevent XXE attacks
    libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
    
    // Set libxml options to prevent external entity loading
    $libxmlOptions = LIBXML_NOENT | LIBXML_COMPACT | LIBXML_NOCDATA;
    
    // Load XML string with error handling
    $xml = simplexml_load_string($xmlString, null, $libxmlOptions);
    
    if ($xml === false) {
        throw new Exception('Failed to parse XML configuration');
    }
    
    // Extract settings
    $settings = [];
    
    // Process configuration elements
    foreach ($xml->children() as $element) {
        $settings[(string)$element->getName()] = (string)$element;
    }
    
    return $settings;
}
?>
